hypothesis: Incorporating metal-centered electronic descriptors (explicit d‑electron count, estimated oxidation state, and a GFN1‑xTB-derived local magnetic moment) into the ∆-learning XGBoost model will reduce the HSE06 band gap prediction MAE for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni by at least 20% relative to the current ∆-learning model using only ST‑135/RAC/APRDF descriptors.
